data.reasoning: Both models failed to review PKGBUILD due to erroneous binary file detection, preventing any safety assessment of build/install logic.
coverage_issues: Critical PKGBUILD file skipped by both models
No review of build/install scripts or network/filesystem access points
false_negatives: All risks in PKGBUILD (build/package functions) missed
Potential .install hooks or source code risks unexamined
learnings: Fix binary file detection heuristics – PKGBUILD is always text
Prioritize PKGBUILD as mandatory first file
Add fallback mechanism when critical files fail to parse
Improve error handling for initial package structure validation
